python-0.title: Module 0 — Foundations
python-0.description: Workspace + programming basics: IPO model, syntax, and comments.

outcomes: Navigate the editor, Run button, and terminal
Understand what syntax is and why SyntaxError happens
why: Sets up the mental model + workspace skills
Prevents beginner confusion before writing bigger programs

python-1.title: Module 1 — Core Building Blocks
python-1.description: Variables/types, operators/expressions, strings, and mini-program patterns.

outcomes: Store values in variables and explain types
Use operators + expressions to compute results
Work with strings (print, f-strings, indexing, methods)
Build mini-programs using Ask → Convert → Compute → Show
why: These are the building blocks behind almost every beginner program
Makes conditionals/loops feel natural in the next module

python-2.title: Module 2 — Control Flow + Collections
python-2.description: Conditionals, loops, lists, and functions — stitched into story-based mini-projects.

outcomes: Use if/elif/else with comparisons and boolean logic
Write while loops for validation and repeating actions
Use for loops to iterate ranges and lists
Create and use lists to store many values
Write reusable functions with parameters and return values
why: This is where programs start to feel 'alive' (decisions + repetition)
Lists + functions unlock real mini-app structure

moduleIntroUi.introVideoHint: Watch first if you want the big picture before practice.

defaults.outcome1: Learn the core ideas with clear, guided examples
defaults.outcome2: Practice with interactive questions and instant feedback
defaults.outcome3: Build confidence to use this in the next modules
defaults.why1: This module unlocks skills you’ll reuse constantly
defaults.why2: It improves speed and accuracy on real problems
defaults.why3: It’s a foundation for interviews and real-world projects

empty.title: No modules yet
empty.desc: Seed at least one module for this subject to enable navigation.
